name: Avatar
description: James Cameron's Avatar — Pandora, the Na'vi, and the billion-dollar visual-effects juggernaut.

questions.q: Who directed the 2009 film Avatar?

source.notes: Cameron had previously directed Titanic.

questions.q: On which fictional moon is Avatar set?

source.notes: A moon of the gas giant Polyphemus.

questions.q: What are the 10-foot-tall, blue-skinned inhabitants of Pandora called?

source.notes: Developed with a conlang designed by USC's Paul Frommer.

questions.q: What is the name of the valuable mineral being mined on Pandora?

source.notes: A tongue-in-cheek engineering term for an idealized material.

questions.q: Who plays the paralyzed ex-Marine Jake Sully?

source.notes: Worthington reprised the role in Avatar: The Way of Water.

questions.q: Which actress plays Neytiri, the Na'vi princess?

source.notes: Saldana also plays Gamora in the MCU.

questions.q: In what year was the original Avatar released in theaters?

source.notes: December 18, 2009.

questions.q: Which actress plays Dr. Grace Augustine, the lead exobotanist running the Avatar program?

source.notes: Cameron had worked with Weaver on Aliens.

questions.q: Who plays the ruthless head of security, Colonel Miles Quaritch?

source.notes: Returns (in Na'vi form) for the sequel.

questions.q: Which corporation funds the mining operation on Pandora?

source.notes: Fictional Earth megacorp.

questions.q: What is the visual-effects company that created most of Avatar's CGI?

source.notes: New Zealand-based, founded by Peter Jackson.

questions.q: Most of Avatar's live-action footage was shot in which country, also home to the effects company?

source.notes: Also where Lord of the Rings was filmed.

questions.q: Approximately how much did Avatar gross worldwide during its original theatrical run?

source.notes: Later climbed further with re-release.

questions.q: What kind of large armored robotic suits do human soldiers on Pandora operate?

source.notes: Amplified Mobility Platform.

questions.q: Which massive, sacred Na'vi tree is at the center of the clan's home?

source.notes: Hometree is the clan's dwelling; Tree of Souls is the sacred connection tree.

questions.q: Which Na'vi clan lives in Hometree and becomes the focus of the first film?

source.notes: Omaticaya — 'Ikran' is actually the banshee creature.

questions.q: Who plays the ambitious RDA corporate administrator Parker Selfridge?

source.notes: Constantly chewing on a golf ball.

questions.q: Which combat-helicopter pilot, turned defector, is played by Michelle Rodriguez?

source.notes: Trudy Chacon pilots a Samson helicopter.

questions.q: The long, flying Pandora creatures the Na'vi tame and ride are called what?

source.notes: Ikran is the Na'vi name; Toruk is the larger 'great leonopteryx.'

questions.q: Avatar was briefly dethroned as the highest-grossing film of all time by which 2019 release, before reclaiming the top spot?

source.notes: Avatar reclaimed the title after a 2021 China re-release.

questions.q: Avatar won three Academy Awards in 2010, in Cinematography, Art Direction, and what other technical category?

source.notes: Lost Best Picture to The Hurt Locker.

questions.q: The long-awaited 2022 sequel was titled what?

source.notes: Released December 16, 2022.
